title: Quest 34400 2-in-1 Popcorn & French Crêpe Pancake Maker, Non-Stick 8 Inch Electric Pan with Batter Spreader - Also Cooks Eggs, Omelettes & Flatbreads., Black/Transparent
features: ELECTRIC POPCORN & CREPE MAKER – This electric 2-in-1 popcorn & crepe maker is the perfect multi-functional kitchen appliance to provide you with delicious home-made treats in just a matter of minutes.

NON-STICK HOT PLATE – This pancake and crepe machine features an 8” non-stick hot plate that will cook your sweet treats perfectly, and not have them stick to the base during the cooking process. Once you’ve made your pancakes the surface is super easy to wipe clean once cooled down.

CHOOSE YOUR TREATS – This multi-functional device comes complete with everything you need to create each treat! For popcorn there is a lid that fits over the hot plate to encase the kernels whilst they pop, then this doubles as a serving bowl too. In order to make the perfect crepes there’s a T-Stick batter spreader that will give you the perfect thinly spread mix for the best results.

VERSATILE APPLIANCE – Not only does this hot plate make popcorn and cook delicious pancakes & crepes, but it is also suitable to make omelettes, scrambled eggs, & flatbreads, amongst many others. The popcorn maker also features a cool to touch handle and non-slip feet, making it super safe and simple to use.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
Included Components: 1 x popcorn & french crêpe pancake maker
description: Product Description Perfect for Pancake Tuesday & Parties Quest Electric Pancake & Popcorn Maker Make delicious pancakes, crepes, omelettes and more with this versatile Pancake Maker from Quest. Its cooking plate spans a 8" diameter for plenty of cooking space, and is also non-stick, making cleaning simple. A lid is also included, allowing you to safely heat up popcorn kernels in an enclosed space before functioning as a serving bowl afterward. Previous page Pancakes & Popcorn Make both pancakes & popcorn with this multi-functional appliance - two classic well-loved treats! Non-Stick Plate The non-stick cooking plate prevents your food from getting stuck, and also makes cleaning simpler. Accessories Included The pancake maker comes with a lid for popcorn, a measuring cup, and a wooden batter spreader. Easy Controls The device is controlled by a simple on/off switch, with a helpful indicator light on the handle. Raised Edges The edge of the pancake maker is slightly raised to ensure none of the mixture spills over the side.
